name: Shirebrook

locations.address:
Bolsover District Council,
Sherwood Lodge,
Bolsover,
Chestefield

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Shirebrook. It belongs to the North East Local Policing Unit. 
Shirebrook is a mid-sized market town in a semi-rural location close to the Nottinghamshire border. Access is from the A632 from Bolsover.
